missed_changes: Strong emphasis on cross-chain interoperability / bridges (LayerZero, composability) not anticipated in prediction
Backed restaking / verifiable cloud (EigenLayer) — a specific thesis not named
Explicit privacy-preserving computation focus (Aleo) as a distinct ZK application area
Vocal open-source / anti-'safetyism' advocacy ('open source is the technological equivalent of free speech')
Named NEAR specifically as the epicenter for AI x crypto
Concrete DePIN bet on energy grid / virtual power plants (Daylight) — beyond the GPU-compute framing of the prediction
notes: All five excited sectors were strongly confirmed via concrete actions and statements in the window (Jolt zkVM, Aleo, NEAR AI x crypto, Daylight DePIN, XMTP social, L3s/EigenLayer modular scaling, CSX cohort spanning all themes). The two concerns (memecoins, US regulatory uncertainty) and the ETH token call and the risk_on macro stance were never addressed in the provided statements — Ali's later remarks are infrastructure/technology-focused and contain no price, macro, or token-market commentary, consistent with his stated preference for durable tech over price action. No contradictions found.
